mano_cua.result_summary: CSS selectors for file-format advice ([href$=".pdf"], [href$=".doc"], etc.) are generic attribute selectors NOT scoped to a/area elements, causing false positives on <link> tags in <head>. Fix commit a5caf761f3 adds :not(link) to each selector. mano-cua confirmed selectors in DevTools Sources panel; session killed at step 73 but source code diff conclusively confirms the bug.
mano_cua.last_reasoning: mano-cua opened CSS source in DevTools Sources panel, found selectors [download],[href$=".pdf"],[href$=".doc"]... without element scoping. Source diff confirms buggy_commit uses bare [href$=".ext"] selectors while fix_commit adds :not(link) to each.
